rationale: The S&P 500 is in a strong uptrend, trading at record highs and significantly above its SMAs, fueled by bullish AI sentiment. However, the RSI is indicating overbought conditions (70.1), and crucially, all independent technical strategies are neutral, offering no clear entry signal. Furthermore, reports of hedge funds reducing risk despite the rally suggest institutional caution, making this a poor time to initiate a new discretionary spread bet.
